metadata.description: 6-module product certification covering SmartPencil buttonology, deal structure, and workflow mastery. Reps must score 80% or higher on each module quiz to earn SmartPencil certification.
metadata.target_audience: Sales representatives and customer success managers

modules.title: Mobile App & Digital Showroom Input
modules.description: How to access SmartPencil through the mobile app, create Digital Deal Jackets, scan licenses, scan VINs, and complete Privacy Notices and Prequalifications. The five requirements for generating a SmartPencil: Digital Deal Jacket, ZIP code, Privacy Notice, Prequal/Soft Pull Consent, and VIN.

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of Smart Pencil?

options.B: To generate accurate payment options based on customer credit and specific vehicle information

questions.question: Smart Pencil payments are generated primarily based on what customer data points?

options.B: Customer credit score, Customer Zip Code
options.C: Customer email address, and Mobile Number

questions.question: Why is the customer ZIP code critical in the Smart Pencil process?

options.B: To calculate taxes fees and OEM rebates

questions.question: Which of the following BEST describes a Digital Deal Jacket?

options.B: A folder on the salesperson computer
options.C: The customer profile created in the Compliance Center
options.D: A physical file in the dealership

questions.question: Which FIVE items are required to build a Smart Pencil?

options.A: Email phone co-buyer VIN stock number
options.B: Digital Deal Jacket ZIP code Privacy Notice Prequal VIN
options.C: Drivers license insurance pay stubs trade title VIN
options.D: Manager approval prequal vehicle color VIN ZIP

questions.question: In the Digital Showroom, Which document should be completed FIRST because it is easy to forget?
In Control, and Elevate a Soft Pull Consent Form is required in order to generate what?
What is the definitive FIRST step in the informativ Process?

options.B: Create the Digital Deal Jacket with a license scan or manual input of customer information

questions.question: The VIN scanning tile is located in which platform?
True or False: You can scan a drivers license OR manually add a customer to create the Digital Deal Jacket.
True or False: A valid customer ZIP code is required to calculate accurate taxes, fees, and rebates in Smart Pencil.
Put these steps in order: Create Profile Scan VIN Sign Privacy Sign Prequal

options.A: Create Profile Scan VIN Sign Privacy Sign Prequal
options.B: Scan VIN Create Profile Sign Prequal Sign Privacy
options.C: Sign Prequal Sign Privacy Scan VIN Create Profile
options.D: Sign Privacy Sign Prequal Create Profile Scan VIN

questions.question: True or False: In The Enrich Package, a Credit Score and Customer Bureau are shown to the Desk Manager.
Where does vehicle pricing information come from?
True or False: The VIN number is required to calculate accurate Smart Pencil payments
If a customer changes vehicles after creating a smart pencil what must a Sales Person do to reflect the change?

options.B: Update the VIN in the Digital Showroom Vehicle Information tile

questions.question: True or False: Once a Smart Pencil is created, you can return to the Mobile App to add or change a VIN to update the Smart Pencil
Entering vehicle information on the Privacy Notice screen will:

options.A: Push the VIN to the Compliance Center
options.C: NOT currently push to the Compliance Center

questions.question: If you did NOT enter a vehicle in the Mobile App where can it be added later?

options.B: Vehicle Information tile in Digital Showroom

questions.question: Scenario: DDJ, Privacy Prequal are done but no vehicle added. What is next?

options.B: Use Vehicle Information tile in Digital Showroom to enter the VIN
options.C: Delete the customer and start over

questions.question: True or False: All packages with Smart Pencil require some form of Soft Pull Consent to be completed in order to generate the payments?
True or False: In both the Elevate and Control Packages, users are able to view the customer’s credit score and bureau information upon receiving the Soft Pull consent?
True or False: In the Enrich Package, the Smart Pencil process does NOT use credit data at all?
True or False: Soft Pull Consent is required before running the Soft Pull in ANY package?

modules.title: SmartPencil Top of Screen & Navigation
modules.description: Navigation controls, Customer Details, Notes, Save Deal vs Print Deal functionality, VIN changes, vehicle pricing from ICC inventory data, Retail vs MSRP pricing, dealer profit calculations, F&I modal, and Pay All Fees Up Front toggle.
key_concepts: Save Deal vs Print Deal difference
Pay All Fees Up Front toggle
trade payoff vs trade value vs trade allowance

questions.question: What does the “Customers” button at the top Left of Smart Pencil do?

options.B: Returns the user to the main dashboard

questions.question: Which top navigation button hides or reveals the customer’s Contact Information?
True or False: The Customer Details button allows you to verify you are working on the correct customer.
True or False: The Notes section allows users to add internal deal comments.
What happens when a user clicks Save Deal?

options.B: It saves the current deal configuration to the Smart Pencil dashboard
options.C: It sends the deal to lenders
options.D: It adds the deal to the Digital Deal Jacket

questions.question: What happens when a user clicks Print Deal?

options.A: It only prints a paper copy
options.B: It saves the Smart Pencil worksheet into the Digital Deal Jacket
options.D: It sends the deal to the CRM

questions.question: True or False: Save Deal and Print Deal perform the same function.
Why does printing the Smart Pencil worksheet save it to the Digital Deal Jacket?

options.B: To create a paper trail of what was presented to the customer

questions.question: True or False: The VIN can be changed directly from the top of the Smart Pencil screen.
If the vehicle VIN is changed inside Smart Pencil what happens to the deal?

options.A: A completely new customer is created
options.B: The deal recalculates using the new vehicle information

questions.question: Where does vehicle pricing information originate?
Adjusting MSRP or Retail Price inside Smart Pencil primarily affects which value?
True or False: Retail Price and MSRP can be different amounts inside Smart Pencil.
If Retail Price is increased what happens to Dealer Profit?
When first logging into the Compliance Center where are the Loan and Lease columns located?

options.A: Already active on the main screen

questions.question: True or False: Lease options will only generate when the selected vehicle qualifies for leasing.
What does the F&I Gear modal allow a manager to adjust?
True or False: The system automatically knows lender rules and will not allow markups that violate those rules.
What does the Pay All Fees Up Front toggle control?

options.A: Whether taxes and fees are included in the out of pocket calculation.
options.B: Whether the deal can be printed
options.C: Whether the deal can be saved

questions.question: Turning OFF Pay All Fees Up Front will result in:

options.B: Max Out of Pocket due at signing and more fees rolled into the payment

questions.question: True or False: Entering trade payoff trade value and trade allowance will directly affect the profit calculation.
Which value represents what the dealership is showing the customer for their trade?
In the Enrich package what is different on the Smart Pencil screen compared to Elevate or Control?

options.C: The credit score and bureau are not displayed

questions.question: True or False: Even in Enrich the system still uses credit data to calculate payments it is simply hidden from the user.
Which action creates a permanent record of a Smart Pencil presentation in the customer file?
Which action saves the current Smart Pencil configuration so it will appear the same when you return later?
True or False: The profit amount in Smart Pencil updates automatically whenever pricing or trade values are changed.
True or False: Adjusting the Invoice price inside Smart Pencil will directly affect the calculated dealer profit.
True or False: The Loan or Lease columns are defaulted as the “Available Columns” on the Compliance Center Dashboard
Why would Smart Pencil not generate a Lease Option?
Which field allows a user to adjust how much money the dealership is putting into the trade? (Maybe this is shown to the client or not?)
When reviewing a Smart Pencil deal, which button allows a manager to see lender reserve and markup rules?
What is the most accurate effect of turning OFF “Pay All Fees Up Front”?

options.A: It removes taxes and fees entirely
options.B: It lowers due at signing/Max out of Pocket by rolling more fees/taxes into the payment
options.C: It prevents printing the Smart Pencil
options.D: It locks the deal from edits

questions.question: Click the Profit Arrow has what effect?

options.A: It shows full profit, front and back, along with multiple deal permutations
options.B: It shows trade Values for different regions
options.C: It submits the deal to the lender

modules.title: Loan Deal Structure
modules.description: Loan payment grids, captive lenders vs show all lenders, term-based negotiation strategy, profit breakdown (front end vs back end), reserve split, incentive programs, add-ons, trade calculations, taxes/titling/licensing, and the Best tag indicator.
key_concepts: front end vs back end profit
Pay All Fees Up Front on loans

questions.question: In Smart Pencil clicking the Loan tab displays:
True or False: Switching from Loan to Lease changes the payment calculation shown at the bottom of the screen.
Lease options will typically only appear when:

options.B: A new vehicle that qualifies for leasing is selected

questions.question: What is a captive lender?

options.B: The OEM financing arm such as GM Financial for Chevrolet

questions.question: True or False: The Captive Lenders Only toggle limits payment options to the manufacturer financing programs.
When the Show All Lenders option is selected the system will:
True or False: Dealers can add their own lenders such as a local credit union as long as rate sheets are provided.
Smart Pencil encourages negotiation on which element instead of price or trade?
Why is negotiating on term preferred over negotiating on price?

options.B: It keeps dealership profit intact while adjusting payment

questions.question: The green Best tag represents:

options.B: The option that best balances customer payment and dealer profit

questions.question: The profit breakdown panel shows which two main categories of profit?

options.B: Front end profit and back end profit

questions.question: True or False: Adjusting the invoice price will directly change the displayed dealer profit.
Reserve Split refers to:

options.B: Splitting finance profit between the dealership and the bank

questions.question: Which of the following is considered BACK END profit?

options.C: F&I products like warranty or GAP

questions.question: Incentive programs in Smart Pencil are refreshed from data providers approximately:

options.D: Only at the beginning of the month

questions.question: True or False: Users can manually add custom incentives in addition to system loaded incentives.
Custom Incentives in Smart Pencil can also be treated as:
The Add Ons section is used for:

options.B: Adding optional products like wheels tires or packages

questions.question: True or False: Add ons can be preconfigured to appear on every deal by the implementations team.
The Pay All Fees Up Front toggle controls:

options.A: Whether taxes and fees are included in the monthly payment
options.B: Whether the deal can be printed

questions.question: Turning ON Pay All Fees Up Front will generally result in:

options.A: Lower monthly payment and higher due at signing/out of pocket.
options.B: Higher monthly payment and lower due at signing

questions.question: Which field represents what the customer still owes on their trade?
Which field represents what the dealership is actually offering the customer for their trade?
True or False: Updating trade value vs allowance will immediately recalculate profit and payment.
Taxes titling and licensing amounts in Smart Pencil are generated by:

options.B: A tax calculation API, Dealer provided fees

questions.question: True or False: Each Smart Pencil deal requires a Zip Code to ensure accurate Tax and Rebate Information.
Clicking Save Deal in the Loan screen will:

options.A: Add the worksheet to the Digital Deal Jacket
options.B: Save current changes for later viewing

questions.question: Clicking Print Deal will:

options.A: Save the worksheet into the Digital Deal Jacket

modules.title: Lease Deal Structure
modules.description: Lease tab mechanics, money factor, new vehicle lease qualification, captive lender leasing, mileage and term options, lease-specific Pay All Fees Up Front behavior, conquest/loyalty incentives, add-ons on leases, and Max Out-of-Pocket.
key_concepts: Pay All Fees Up Front on leases

questions.question: In the Enrich package the document used instead of a prequal is called:
True or False: A vehicle must qualify for leasing in order for lease options to appear in Smart Pencil.
When the Lease tab is opened the highlighted month and mileage options represent:

options.B: The dealership preferred configurations set with implementations

questions.question: True or False: Longer lease terms generally result in lower monthly payments.
Money Factor in a lease most closely represents:

options.B: Estimated interest cost for the lease

questions.question: If a used vehicle is selected what will typically happen on the Lease tab?

options.A: Lease options will still display normally
options.B: Lease options will usually not appear

questions.question: True or False: Smart Pencil is designed to automatically present the best deal for both the dealership and the customer.
The Pay All Fees Up Front toggle on a lease controls:

options.A: Whether taxes, fees, add ons and First Month’s lease are paid at signing or rolled into payments
options.C: Whether the deal can be saved
options.D: Whether money factor can be edited

questions.question: Turning OFF Pay All Fees Up Front will:

options.B: Generate the “Pay 1st Lease Payment Upfront” button

questions.question: True or False: Clicking Save Deal stores the current configuration for later use but does not add a document to the Digital Deal Jacket.
Clicking Print Deal on a lease worksheet will:

options.B: Save the worksheet into the Digital Deal Jacket

questions.question: True or False: Leasing typically uses the OEM captive lender rather than multiple outside banks.
Incentives shown on the Lease screen are updated approximately:
Which type of incentives can often appear on leases?
True or False: Users can add custom incentives to a lease deal if needed.
Add-ons in a lease deal are typically used for:

options.B: Adding F&I products such as wheel and tire protection

questions.question: True or False: Add-ons can be pre-built and automatically included on every lease deal by implementations.
Max Out-of-Pocket on a lease represents:

options.B: Only the customer down payment due at signing

questions.question: True or False: Taxes, titling and licensing on leases are calculated based on state specific rules.
If an additional dealership fee is missing from the Taxes and Fees section what should be done?

options.B: Ask implementations to add the fee to the configuration
options.C: Manually type it into every deal

questions.question: Recommended Vehicles allows a user to:

options.B: Pivot to a different vehicle without starting over

questions.question: True or False: Leasing is considered beneficial for dealerships because customers must return in a few years to make another decision.
Which action saves the worksheet as part of the customer paper trail?

modules.title: Recommendations & LMS Push
modules.description: Using the Recommendations rail to find alternate vehicles, Build New Deal functionality, sorting options (Best Payment, Days on Lot, Profit), pushing deals to RouteOne/DealerTrack/CUDLE, Save Deal before LMS push, and deal structure field locking.

questions.question: The Recommendations rail is primarily used for:

options.B: Finding alternate vehicles in dealer inventory, based on specific parameters

questions.question: True or False: The Recommendations feature can be helpful when the original vehicle sells out from underneath the salesperson.
Which of the following sorting options is available in the Recommendations section?
When a user selects Build New Deal from the Recommendations rail what happens?

options.B: A new deal is created using the selected vehicle while keeping previous deal configurations

questions.question: True or False: Using Recommendations allows a desk manager to pivot to another vehicle without rebuilding the entire deal from scratch.
The Send Update Lead to RouteOne button is used to:

options.A: Save the deal in the Digital Deal Jacket
options.B: Push the Smart Pencil deal structure to the RouteOne lender management system

questions.question: If a user changes the down payment in Smart Pencil what must be done before pushing to RouteOne?

options.B: Save Deal to update the structure

questions.question: True or False: Before a deal is pushed to the LMS, the deal structure fields on that screen are locked because they are controlled by Smart Pencil.
Which of the following most accurately describes the information is carried over when building a new deal from Recommendations?

options.A: Customer trade payoff and trade value

questions.question: True or False: Pushing a deal from Smart Pencil to the LMS reduces the need to completely rebuild the deal in RouteOne or Dealertrack.
The Recommendations feature pulls vehicles from:
Which action updates the LMS screen after a change is made in Smart Pencil?

modules.title: Quick Quote & Process Foundations
modules.description: Quick Quote as default deal entry point, the complete SmartPencil process from Digital Deal Jacket through payment generation, package-level consent requirements, and process review covering all foundational concepts.
key_concepts: Soft Pull Consent requirements by package

options.B: To generate accurate payment options based on customer credit and specific vehicle information

options.D: A physical file in the dealership

options.A: Create Profile Scan VIN Sign Privacy Sign Prequal
options.B: Scan VIN Create Profile Sign Prequal Sign Privacy
options.C: Sign Prequal Sign Privacy Scan VIN Create Profile
options.D: Sign Privacy Sign Prequal Create Profile Scan VIN
